reviews.review_msg: AMAZING PROF! Prof Larry is very humourous and excellent in teaching. Excellent course, I highly recommend taking classes with him.

Arne seems like a decent guy but his course CA386 is just atrocious. He is hyper critical about the most superfluous details in assignments, gives the most nonsensical and subjective quizzes/tests and even admits to designing them poorly in emails. The EXTENSIVE readings literally do not help at all, I have lost my will to even bother trying. AVOID

Martin is an amazing teacher. He prepares his lectures so well and the outcome is that you are moved and captivated by his ideas and insights. One of the best lecturers I have ever had the pleasure of listening to. The assignments put you into the world of composing for film.

Martin is really good professor-- and he teaches FPA 289 with a passion for film music. I was really interested in the beginning, but I found myself sleeping in each lecture. I had a morning tutorial the same day. Too bad I missed a lot of lectures, but I still ended up with great grade. A good prof, easy marker!
If you ever have an opportunity to take a class with Martin, take it! He is so enthusiastic, open and gentle- it feels much more like a conversation than a lecture.  He's also brilliant.
Really interesting guy... Too bad over half the class never came to lecture, they missed out on some cool stuff!
Very knowledgeable and an easy marker
super nice.extremely helpful and interesting. Make sure you get all his hot tips. highly recommend take all the music classes with him! The best prof I've ever had in SFU. =)
